Registry / Terms / pre-setting device

pre-setting device

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #01217 · 2 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 2 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

2 distinct definitions across 2 publications.

2 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
202X2019OIML R117-1:2019T.p.303379
device which permits the selection of the quantity to be measured and which automatically stops the flow of the liquid at the end of the measurement of the selected quantity
pending
202X1998OIML R 81:19983.1501217
the means used to select a quantity to be delivered and which automatically stops the flow of the liquid after the measurement and delivery of the selected quantity
pending
